title: Beef and Pierogi Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy Chinese-inspired stir fry made with beef and pierogi. Serve as a main course or as a side dish.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the beef to the skillet and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the pierogi to the skillet and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together the soy sauce, garlic, and ginger.
Pour the soy sauce mixture over the beef and pierogi, and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the pierogi are cooked through.
Stir in the green onions and sesame seeds.
